allowed_claim: Improved zero-shot transfer on evaluated external cohorts
evidence_required: Fair baseline table with Full, Raw Mamba, ResNet1D/CNN, MiniRocket-only, HRV-only plus bootstrap CI
fallback_if_not_supported: If baseline matches or exceeds Full, present component behavior and failure modes instead

evidence_required: ECE, MCE, Brier, reliability diagram, sensitivity, specificity, PPV, NPV at threshold 0.5
fallback_if_not_supported: If calibration is poor, state calibration is required before clinical operating use

evidence_required: HRV-only result, no-HRV check, HRV domain classifier, duration/noise sensitivity
fallback_if_not_supported: If HRV domain AUC is high, state HRV is domain-sensitive and discuss limitation

evidence_required: Lead dropout plus UMAP/probing/CKA or similarity analysis
fallback_if_not_supported: If weak, state branches are complementary by design but strict disentanglement remains limited

allowed_claim: Q=3 is a robustness-oriented operating point
evidence_required: Pooling sensitivity mean, Q=2, Q=3, Q=4, Q=8, max on clean and perturbation
fallback_if_not_supported: If another Q is better, select by validation or present Q=3 as a default trade-off only

evidence_required: Subject-aware split, fixed threshold, no TTA, no threshold tuning on target, explicit label mapping
fallback_if_not_supported: If an exception exists, disclose it and avoid fully protocol-faithful wording
